RULING:
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion for preference is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). The official trial date of August 1, 2016 is maintained with preference status. The next return date remains October 3, 2016. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is December 23, 2016. All dates related to discovery, motions and disclosures remain dictated by the August 1, 2016 trial date. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands stating their best and final offers. These confidential demands must be submitted to Pang Ly by September 26, 2016 at 12:00p.m. Settlement conference in room 603 at 9:30a.m. on September 29, 2016. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the Court pursuant to San Francisco Local Rules of Court Rule 5 on October 3, 2016 at 1:30p.m. in Department 503. The parties shall comply with Local Rule 5.0 and provide a confidential settlement statement by September 29, 2016 at 2:00p.m. No party opposes preference status being granted. Defendants' oral request for plaintiff to produce the updated medical record is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L.
